allow: Bash(ARCHITECT_PROMPT='Tu es l ARCHITECTE du projet Farm Flow. Lis ton inbox : cat ~/.claude/teams/farm-flow/inboxes/architect.json | python3 -c ""import json,sys; msgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(msgs[0][\\""text\\""] if msgs else \\""No messages\\""\)"" pour voir ta tache. En resume: Story 12.1 — ADR Export PDF/Excel. Produis docs/decisions/006-export-pdf-excel.md \(choix lib PDF vs jspdf, lib Excel xlsx, templates facture/rapport vague/rapport financier\) ET src/types/export.ts \(6 interfaces TypeScript\). Respecte R1-R9 CLAUDE.md. Quand termine: mets a jour docs/TASKS.md Story 12.1 → FAIT, ecris dans ~/.claude/teams/farm-flow/inboxes/team-lead.json')
Bash(do echo '=== Window: $window ===' tmux capture-pane -t farm-flow-team:$window -p)
Bash(1 echo "" echo "Agent statuses:" grep -n "FAIT\\|EN COURS" /Users/ronald/project/dkfarm/farm-flow/docs/TASKS.md)
